empathetic_output.support_response: We value our customers like family here at (company name) and we will do everything in our power to resolve this issue as soon as possible. Can you please give us some more details such as your tracking number? That way we can investigate further on what might have caused the delay and get back to you within the next 24 hours with an update regarding your package status.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my order, <PRODUCT>, for <PRODUCT>, which I was really looking forward to receiving. Unfortunately, it's now been three weeks since the expected delivery date and I haven't received any updates from the courier. I would greatly appreciate it if you could please look into this and provide me with a revised delivery timeline or a refund, so I can explore alternative options locally. Thank you for your help with this matter, I'm grateful for your time.

formal_output.support_response: Our team is working diligently to investigate the issue regarding the delay in shipping your product. Please allow us some more days as we work on resolving this situation; once an update becomes available, our system will automatically notify you via email. If there are no further delays, your package should be delivered within two weeks afterward. In cases where additional assistance may be required, one of our representatives shall contact you directly by phone at their earliest convenience.
